step_rationale: MMP inhibitor; regulates ECM remodeling pre- and post-MI; reflects vascular and cardiac fibrotic response.
mechanism: TIMP-1 inhibits MMP-driven fibrous-cap degradation and mediates ECM remodeling and cardiac fibrosis post-MI.
